name: Saola
conservationEfforts: Saola Working Group coordinates conservation. Camera traps and community patrols in Annamite Mountains. Saola breeding program planned but no captive individuals exist.
description: Discovered in 1992, the saola is one of the rarest large mammals on Earth. Known as the Asian unicorn, it has only been documented in the wild a handful of times in the forests of Vietnam and Laos.
